mission.title: Install and Configure Koordinator on Kubernetes
mission.description: Koordinator is a QoS-based scheduling system designed to optimize the layout and status of workloads such as microservices, web services, big data jobs, and AI jobs on Kubernetes. Installing Koordinator enhances resource utilization and performance in your Kubernetes cluster.

steps.title: Add the Helm repository
steps.description:
Add the Koordinator Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration.
```bash
helm repo add koordinator https://koordinator-sh.github.io/charts
helm repo update
```

steps.title: Install Koordinator
steps.description:
Install the Koordinator Helm chart in a new namespace called 'koordinator'.
```bash
helm install koordinator koordinator/koordinator --namespace koordinator --create-namespace --version 1.7.0
```

steps.title: Verify the installation
steps.description:
Check if the Koordinator pods are running successfully.
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace koordinator
```

steps.title: Post-install configuration
steps.description:
Set resource limits for the Koordinator deployment to optimize resource usage.
```bash
kubectl edit deployment koordinator --namespace koordinator
# Add resource limits under spec.template.spec.containers
```

uninstall.title: Remove the Helm release
uninstall.description:
Uninstall the Koordinator release from the cluster.
```bash
helm uninstall koordinator --namespace koordinator
```

uninstall.title: Clean up CRDs
uninstall.description:
Remove the Custom Resource Definitions associated with Koordinator.
```bash
kubectl delete crd clustercolocationprofiles.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd devices.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd podmigrationjobs.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd reservations.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd nodemetrics.slo.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd nodeslos.slo.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd elasticquotas.scheduling.sigs.k8s.io
kubectl delete crd podgroups.scheduling.sigs.k8s.io
kubectl delete crd noderesourcetopologies.topology.node.k8s.io
kubectl delete crd elasticquotaprofiles.quota.koordinator.sh
kubectl delete crd recommendations.analysis.koordinator.sh
```

uninstall.title: Remove the namespace
uninstall.description:
Delete the Koordinator namespace to clean up all resources.
```bash
kubectl delete namespace koordinator
```

upgrade.title: Backup current state
upgrade.description:
Export the current configuration and state of Koordinator.
```bash
kubectl get all --namespace koordinator -o yaml > koordinator-backup.yaml
```

upgrade.title: Update the Helm repository
upgrade.description:
Update the Helm repository to get the latest charts.
```bash
helm repo update
```

upgrade.title: Upgrade Koordinator
upgrade.description:
Upgrade the Koordinator installation to the latest version.
```bash
helm upgrade koordinator koordinator/koordinator --namespace koordinator --version 1.7.0
```

upgrade.title: Verify the upgrade
upgrade.description:
Check if the Koordinator pods are running the new version successfully.
```bash
kubectl get pods --namespace koordinator
```

troubleshooting.title: Pods stuck in Pending
troubleshooting.description:
If the Koordinator pods are stuck in Pending, check for resource availability in the cluster.
```bash
kubectl describe pod <pod-name> --namespace koordinator
kubectl get nodes
```

troubleshooting.title: CrashLoopBackOff error
troubleshooting.description:
If you see a CrashLoopBackOff error, check the logs of the pod for errors.
```bash
kubectl logs <pod-name> --namespace koordinator
```

troubleshooting.title: Service not reachable
troubleshooting.description:
If the service is not reachable, ensure that the service is correctly configured and that the pods are running.
```bash
kubectl get svc --namespace koordinator
kubectl get pods --namespace koordinator
```

resolution.summary: A successful installation of Koordinator will show all pods running in the 'koordinator' namespace without errors. You can access the Koordinator services as configured.
codeSnippets:
helm repo add koordinator https://koordinator-sh.github.io/charts
helm repo update

kubectl edit deployment koordinator --namespace koordinator
# Add resource limits under spec.template.spec.containers

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have Kubernetes cluster access and the Helm and kubectl tools installed.
